title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
To register for Account Alerts, all you need to have is a Savings or Current Account (for sole proprietorship, partnership and other corporates) with us.
Just ask for the AccountAlerts application form available at all our branches and ATMs or download it. Tick on the alerts you would like to receive and we’ll take care of the rest. Or, simply call our and the application form will be delivered right at your doorstep. You can click in 'login' and register online using Internet Banking.

metadata.description: Account Alerts allows you to monitor various type of activity on your accounts, and be notified either by E-mail or SMS as and when they are executed.
